dependence.value: m&Detail;$000000, d&Detail;$000000, r&Tax;$000000, i&Detail;$000000, c&Detail;$000000, ctgt30
dependence.alias: m, d, t, i, g, c

alias.value: master, detail, tax, inquiry, general, inputTax

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)⩓exists(select 1 from #unit b where @@table.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and @@table.so_ct = b.so_ct having count(b.ma_dvcs) > 1)⩓ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1)

field.name: ma_kh
field.check: ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: so_ct
field.resource: master, detail, tax, inquiry, general, inputTax

field.name: ngay_ct
field.resource: master, detail, tax, inquiry, general, inputTax

field.name: tk
field.check: tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: tk_vt
field.check: tk_vt not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_nt
field.check: ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)

field.name: ma_tt
field.check: ma_tt <> '' and ma_tt not in (select ma_tt from dmtt)

field.name: mau_bc
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and mau_bc not in (select mau_bc from dmmaubc3)

field.name: ma_tc
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_tc not in (select ma_tc from v20dmtcthue)

field.name: so_ct0
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and so_ct0 = ''

field.name: ngay_ct0
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ngay_ct0 is null

field.name: ma_kh_j
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh_j <> '' and ma_kh_j not in (select ma_kh from dmkh where cc_yn = 1)

field.name: ten_kh_j
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ten_kh_j = ''

field.name: ma_thue
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_thue not in (select ma_thue from dmthue)⩓ma_thue = '' and ((tk_thue_no <> '') or (t_thue_nt <> 0) or (mau_bc <> '') or (ma_tc <> '') or (ma_mau_ct <> '') or (so_ct0 <> '') or (so_seri0 <> '') or (ngay_ct0 is not null) or (ma_kh_j <> '') or (ten_kh_j <> '') or (dia_chi_j <> '') or (ma_so_thue <> '') or (ten_vt <> '') or (ma_kh2 <> '') or (ghi_chu <> ''))

field.name: tk_thue_no
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and tk_thue_no not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_kh2
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh2 = '' and exists(select 1 from dmtk b where @@table.tk_thue_no = b.tk and b.tk_cn = 1)⩓ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh2 <> '' and ma_kh2 not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: so_lsx
field.check: so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: ma_hd
field.check: ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)

field.name: ma_phi
field.check: ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)

processing.text: &CheckVoucherRightBeforeProcess; declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8), @inputVATExists nvarchar(512), @inputVATDuplicate nvarchar(512) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @tax varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @max3 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundAmount int declare @taxProperty varchar(3), @voucherTemplate varchar(32), @checkInputVAT bit, @duplicateExRate nvarchar(512) select @d0 = getdate(), @status = left(replace(@status, '''', '') , 1) select @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114) select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @voucherID = '&Code;', @tax = 'r&Tax;$' select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chứng từ số %s1 ngày %s2 tại dòng %s3 đã tồn tại.' else 'The voucher number %s1 dated %s2 at row %s3 already exists.' end select @inputVATExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã được cập nhật trong phần thuế đầu vào.' else '&s2; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @inputVATDuplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; trùng nhau trong chi tiết thuế đầu vào.' else '&s2; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @duplicateExRate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; có ngoại tệ hoặc tỷ giá nhập hơn một lần.' else '&s2;, currency or exchange rate already exists.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien' select @taxProperty = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_tc_thue' select @voucherTemplate = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_mau_ct_dv' if not exists(select 1 from dmmauct where ma_mau_ct = @voucherTemplate) select @voucherTemplate = '' if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_kthd_tdv' and val = '1') select @checkInputVAT = 1 else select @checkInputVAT = 0 select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_lsx' select @max3 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct0' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)))) + rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) if @check$Unit <> '1' select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct else select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs --if @r is not null begin -- if @check$Unit <> '1' select replace(replace(replace(@duplicate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as --message from @@table where stt = @r -- else select replace(replace(replace(replace(@duplicate$Unit, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', rtrim(ma_dvcs)), '%s4', --@@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r -- return --end -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@max2 - len(ltrim(rtrim(a.so_lsx)))) + ltrim(rtrim(a.so_lsx)), ma_nt = case when a.ma_nt <> '' then a.ma_nt else @baseCurrency end, so_ct0 = space(@max3 - len(rtrim(a.so_ct0))) + ltrim(a.so_ct0), ma_tt = case when a.ma_tt <> '' then a.ma_tt else c.ma_tt end, tk = case when a.tk <> '' then a.tk else c.tk end from @@table a left join dmkh c on a.ma_kh = c.ma_kh select top 0 ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk into #unit from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #unit select ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk from @@table group by ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmdvcsks b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmct2ks b where b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #table b where a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.stt <> b.stt and (a.ty_gia <> b.ty_gia or a.ma_nt <> b.ma_nt)) if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(replace(@duplicateExRate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end -- Check code select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh <>'' and ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'tk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk <>'' and tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_vt <>'' and tk_vt not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_thue_no', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_thue_no <>'' and tk_thue_no not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk <> '' and ma_nk not in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_hd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; update @@table set mau_bc = case when mau_bc = '' then '3' else mau_bc end, ma_tc = case when ma_tc = '' then @taxProperty else ma_tc end , ma_kh_j = case when ma_kh_j = '' then ma_kh else ma_kh_j end, so_ct0 = case when so_ct0 = '' then so_ct0_m else so_ct0 end, ngay_ct0 = case when ngay_ct0 is null then ngay_ct0_m else ngay_ct0 end, so_seri0 = case when so_seri0 = '' then so_seri0_m else so_seri0 end where ma_thue <> '' update @@table set tk_thue_no = case when a.tk_thue_no <> '' then a.tk_thue_no else b.tk_thue_no3 end from @@table a left join dmthue b on a.ma_thue = b.ma_thue where a.ma_thue <> '' update @@table set ten_kh_j = case when a.ten_kh_j <> '' then a.ten_kh_j else b.ten_kh end, dia_chi_j = case when a.dia_chi_j <> '' then a.dia_chi_j else b.dia_chi end, ma_so_thue = case when a.ma_so_thue <> '' then a.ma_so_thue else rtrim(b.ma_so_thue) end from @@table a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh_j = b.ma_kh where a.ma_thue <> '' -- Check Input VAT if @checkInputVAT = 1 begin select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a join @@table b on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue where a.ngay_ct <> b.ngay_ct or a.so_ct <> b.so_ct group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATDuplicate, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join ctgt30 b with (index(c)) on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATExists, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end end -- Gather select top 0 a.stt_rec, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, b.ma_kh, b.tk, cast(0 as int) as stt, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #id from m&Detail;$000000 a, @@table b insert into #id(stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, stt) select '', ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk order by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk select identity(int, 1, 1) as id, cast(stt as int) as stt, convert(varchar(8), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + ma_kh + tk as c, cast(0 as int) as ln into #ln from @@table order by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, stt declare @lineNumber int, @keyValue varchar(64), @sequence bit select @keyValue = null update #ln set @sequence = case when c = @keyValue then 1 else 0 end, @lineNumber = case when @sequence = 1 then @lineNumber + 1 else 1 end, ln = @lineNumber, @keyValue = c from #ln with (index(0)) create index i on #ln(stt) select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_vt, tien_nt, tien, dien_giai, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.tk_vt, a.tien_nt, round(a.tien_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.dien_giai_i, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.tk = b.tk join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_kh, a.tk, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk_thue_no , tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh as ma_kh_j, ten_kh as ten_kh_j, dia_chi as dia_chi_j, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia into #r&Tax; from r&Tax;$000000 select top 0 * into #ctgt30tmp from #r&Tax; insert into #r&Tax; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, a.ma_dvcs, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct0, a.so_ct0, a.so_seri0, a.ma_thue, isnull(d.thue_suat, 0), a.t_tien_nt, round(a.t_tien_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.t_thue_nt, round(a.t_thue_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.tk_thue_no, a.tk, a.mau_bc, a.ma_tc, a.ma_kh_j, a.ten_kh_j, a.dia_chi_j, a.ma_so_thue, a.ma_kh2, a.ten_vt, a.ghi_chu, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.tk = b.tk left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt where a.ma_thue <> '' order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt insert into #ctgt30tmp select stt_rec, max(stt_rec0), max(line_nbr), max(ma_dvcs), max(ngay_ct), max(so_ct), ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, max(thue_suat), max(t_tien_nt), max(t_tien), max(t_thue_nt), max(t_thue), max(tk_thue_no) , max(tk_du), max(mau_bc), max(ma_tc), ma_kh_j, max(ten_kh_j), max(dia_chi_j),max(ma_so_thue), max(ma_kh2), max(ten_vt), max(ghi_chu), max(ma_nt), max(ty_gia) from #r&Tax; group by stt_rec, so_ct0, ngay_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue,ma_kh_j select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs,ma_nk, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_kh, tk, dien_giai, ma_tt, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, a.ma_dvcs, a.ma_nk, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct0_m, a.so_ct0_m, a.so_seri0_m, a.ma_kh, a.tk, a.dien_giai, a.ma_tt, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia, d.t_tien_nt, d.t_tien, isnull(e.t_thue_nt, 0), isnull(e.t_thue, 0) from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join (select stt_rec, sum(tien_nt) as t_tien_nt, sum(tien) as t_tien from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec left join (select stt_rec, sum(t_thue_nt) as t_thue_nt, sum(t_thue) as t_thue from #r&Tax; group by stt_rec) e on b.stt_rec = e.stt_rec order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_kh, a.tk, a.stt update #m&Detail; set t_thue_nt = isnull(b.t_thue_nt,0), t_thue = isnull(b.t_thue,0) from #m&Detail; a left join (select stt_rec, sum(t_thue_nt) as t_thue_nt, sum(t_thue) as t_thue from #ctgt30tmp group by stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec=b.stt_rec select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #i&Detail; from i&Detail;$000000 insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_kh) + '#20$' + rtrim(tk) + '#30$' + rtrim(ma_nt), '' from #m&Detail; select @q = dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Update$Inquiry('#i&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', 'd$', 'tk_vt', '#10$', 'stt_rec', default, default, default, default, default) exec sp_executesql @q -- Insert declare @p varchar(32), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32), @taxTable varchar(32), @insertKey varchar(128), @masterFields varchar(8000), @detailFields varchar(8000), @fieldTax varchar(8000) select @masterFields = 'stt_rec, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ma_ct, ma_nk, ngay_ct, ngay_lct, so_ct, so_seri0, so_ct0, ngay_ct0, so_dh, so_lo, ngay_lo, ma_gd' select @masterFields = @masterFields + ',ma_kh, ong_ba, dien_giai, tk, ma_nt, ty_gia' select @masterFields = @masterFields + ',t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk_thue_no, ma_tt,t_tt_nt, t_tt' select @masterFields = @masterFields + ', nam, ky, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2' select @detailFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_vt, tien_nt, tien, dien_giai' select @detailFields = @detailFields + ',ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, so_dh_i,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select @fieldTax = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs , ma_ct , loai_ct , ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt' select @fieldTax = @fieldTax + ',t_thue, tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, status' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0'), @insertKey = 'month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p, @taxTable = @tax + @p -- m31 select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + '(' + @masterFields + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, ma_dvcs, '''', ''' + @voucherID + ''',ma_nk,ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, so_seri0, so_ct0, ngay_ct0, '''', '''', null,'''' ' select @q = @q + ', ma_kh, '''', dien_giai, tk, ma_nt, ty_gia' select @q = @q + ',t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk, '''', t_tien_nt + t_thue_nt, t_tien + t_thue' select @q = @q + ',0, 0, ''' + @status + ''', getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) select @q = @q + ' from #m31 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- d31 select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @detailFields + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_vt, tien_nt, tien, dien_giai ' select @q = @q + ', ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, '''',' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d31 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q --i31 select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i31 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- c31 select @q = 'insert into ' + @general + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0' select @q = @q + ' from #i31 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- r30 select @q = 'insert into ' + @taxTable + '(' + @fieldTax + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, ''HM2'', '''', ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt' select @q = @q + ', t_thue,tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh_j, ten_kh_j, dia_chi_j, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #ctgt30tmp where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end if exists(select 1 from #ctgt30tmp) begin select @q = 'insert into ctgt30 ' + '(' + @fieldTax + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, ''HM2'', '''', ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt' select @q = @q + ', t_thue,tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh_j, ten_kh_j, dia_chi_j, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #ctgt30tmp ' exec sp_executesql @q end declare @External nvarchar(4000), @Statement nvarchar(4000), @Numeric varchar(4000), @String varchar(4000), @fieldSelect varchar(4000) if @status <> '0' begin declare @ct_yn tinyint, @tk_kt varchar(1013) select @tk_kt = replace(rtrim(val), '''', '') from options where name = 'm_tk_tk_vt' select @ct_yn = cast(val as tinyint) from options where name = 'm_po_tt' -- Payment by Detail select a.* into #detailpost from #d&Detail; a where a.line_nbr = 1 --and (@ct_yn = 0 or not exists (select 1 from #ctgt30tmp t where a.stt_rec = t.stt_rec)) select @External = 'status = ''' + @status + ''', ma_ct = ''' + @voucherID + ''', loai_ct = '''', dien_giai = c.dien_giai, ngay_lct = c.ngay_ct, so_ct = c.so_ct0, t_tien_nt0 = c.t_tien_nt, t_tien0 = c.t_tien, t_tt_nt = c.t_tien_nt + c.t_thue_nt, t_tt = c.t_tien + c.t_thue, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user) select @Statement = 'update #ap set ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct, ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct from #ap a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.ngay_ct0 is null;update #ap set so_ct = b.so_ct, so_ct0 = b.so_ct from #ap a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where isnull(a.so_ct0, '''') = ''''', @Numeric = 'nam, ky, t_cp_nt, t_cp, t_nk_nt, t_nk, tt, tt_nt, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'so_dh, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3' exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostPayment '#m&Detail;', '#detailpost', 'tk', @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '1', '2', '0' end if @status = '2' begin declare @glGroup varchar(128), @glAcctField varchar(128), @glAcctFieldRef varchar(128), @glAmountField varchar(128), @glFCAmountField varchar(128), @glKey varchar(512), @glNoAccList varchar(128), @glNoAccListRef varchar(128), @glGroups varchar(128) select @glAcctField = 'tk_vt', @glAcctFieldRef = 'tk', @glAmountField = 'tien', @glFCAmountField = 'tien_nt', @glKey = '1=1', @glNoAccList = '0', @glNoAccListRef = '1', @glGroups = '1' select @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'so_lo, ma_gd, so_dh, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3', @External = 'dien_giai_h = b.dien_giai, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user), @Statement = '' select @glGroup = rtrim(groupby) from @@sysDatabaseName..voucherinfo where ma_ct = @voucherID select a.*, cast('' as char(2)) as loai_ct, b.ma_kh, b.ma_kh as ma_kh_ref, b.ngay_ct0, b.so_ct0 into #dGL0 from #d&Detail; a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #dGL0 set ngay_ct0 = case when a.ngay_ct0 is null then b.ngay_ct0 else a.ngay_ct0 end, so_ct0 = case when isnull(ltrim(a.so_ct0), '') = '' then b.so_ct0 else a.so_ct0 end from #dGL0 a join (select stt_rec, max(ngay_ct0) as ngay_ct0, max(so_ct0) as so_ct0 from #ctgt30tmp group by stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec select a.*, cast('' as char(2)) as loai_ct, b.ma_kh as ma_kh_ref, b.dien_giai into #glVAT from #ctgt30tmp a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.t_thue_nt + a.t_thue <> 0 update #glVAT set ma_kh2 = '' where tk_thue_no in (select tk from dmtk where tk_cn = 0) update #glVAT set ma_kh_j = case when a.ma_kh2 <> '' then a.ma_kh2 else b.ma_kh end from #glVAT a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec insert into #dGL0 (stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, loai_ct, so_ct, tk_vt, tien_nt, tien, ma_kh, ma_kh_ref , ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi, dien_giai, ngay_ct0, so_ct0) select stt_rec, max(stt_rec0), max(line_nbr), max(ngay_ct), '', max(so_ct), tk_thue_no, sum(t_thue_nt), sum(t_thue), ma_kh_j, ma_kh_ref , '', '', '', '', '', '', max(dien_giai), max(ngay_ct0), max(so_ct0) from #glVAT group by stt_rec, ma_kh_j, ma_kh_ref, tk_thue_no select a.*, b.tk, b.ma_dvcs, @voucherID as ma_ct, b.ngay_ct as ngay_lct, b.ma_nt, b.ty_gia, a.dien_giai as dien_giai_h, cast('' as nvarchar(1024)) as ong_ba, '' as ma_ku, '' as ma_td1, '' as ma_td2, '' as ma_td3, b.ma_nk as ma_nk into #dGL from #dGL0 a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #dGL set so_ct0 = ltrim(so_ct0) exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostGL2 '#m&Detail;', '#dGL', @voucherID, @glAcctField, @glAcctFieldRef, @glAmountField, @glFCAmountField, @glKey, @glNoAccList, @glNoAccListRef, @glGroup, @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '#k', @glGroups end
